response: The band that released the "Trance" EP, Virgin Black, has released a total of 4 albums and 1 EP. The "Trance" EP is the debut EP by Virgin Black, which was independently funded and released as a three-track EP. It was later re-released as a bonus disk on a 2002 re-pressing of their album "Sombre Romantic." Thus, the same band, Virgin Black, has released a total of 4 albums.
